scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace server
scripts.pm2:start: npm run build && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.pm2:restart: npm run build && pm2 restart ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.pm2:stop: pm2 stop ecosystem.config.cjs && pm2 delete nim-chat-web nim-chat-api
